login.title: Welcome
login.subtitle: Sign in to your HR workspace

offline.title: Site offline
offline.fallback: This site is temporarily unavailable. Please contact your administrator.

mfa.title: Two-step verification
mfa.subtitle: Enter the code from your authentication app
mfa.codeHint: The code changes every 30 seconds in your app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password…)
mfa.cancel: ← Cancel and return to sign in

change.title: Securing your account
change.policyHint: Set a strong password: at least 12 characters, an uppercase letter, a digit and a special character.
change.successBreached: Password updated (the previous one appeared in a breach). Please sign in again.
change.successExpired: Password updated (the previous one had expired). Please sign in again.
change.error: An error occurred while changing the password

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists with this email, you'll receive a reset link shortly. The link is valid for 15 minutes.
forgot.sentSpam: Remember to check your spam folder if you don't see anything.

reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password that you don't use anywhere else.
reset.newPasswordHint: At least 12 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit.
reset.noTokenBody: No reset token was found in the URL. Request a new link from the sign-in page.
reset.errorExpired: This link has expired. Request a new one.
reset.errorUsed: This link has already been used.
reset.errorInvalid: Invalid link. Check the URL or request a new one.
reset.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
